description: A client wants to know the status of their appeal. A paralegal needs to check the appellate court's docket.

nodes.task_description: Identify the case name and docket number for the appeal.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the correct case identifiers.

nodes.task_description: Access the appellate court's online docketing system (e.g., PACER for federal courts).

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs into the court's system.

nodes.task_description: Search for the case docket and review the most recent entries to determine the current status.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that the case has been scheduled for oral argument next month.
